final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustration of a cherry blossom campus scene (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "清新日系" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Makoto Shinkai anime background art, 1980s Japanese city pop illustration, Kyoto Animation's pastel campus scenes; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a young woman in a sailor uniform (one)
Scene/backdrop: must include a school building, cherry blossoms falling, gentle breeze moving hair, sunny day
Lighting/mood: needs a sunny, youthful atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a pink cherry blossom palette — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
